_meta.produced_by: Claude (Anthropic) — P3 Build Plan + Phase 1 init, S48
_meta.phase_produced: Phase 5 CBT I-9 PASS — PHASE-READY — S48

paper_title: FRM Measurement and Diagnostics: Standard Protocol for Extracting Parameters, Computing Goodness-of-Fit, and Diagnosing Scope Boundaries

phase_ready.note: CBT I-9 all 7 steps PASS. Session S48. Phase 5 CBT PHASE-READY. All protocol steps IR-12 compliant. All thresholds IR-13 anchored. 5 upstream placeholders resolved.

principle_10_audit.derivation_path: Kvålseth (1985, Am. Statistician 39:279) R²≥0.80 for physical model fit. P3 uses more conservative 0.85. Also supported by P1 empirical floor (min R²_frm≈0.87 across 36 substrates). IR-13 satisfied.

principle_10_audit.constant_or_condition: Δ margin (0.05) for alternative model comparison
principle_10_audit.derivation_path: Burnham & Anderson (2002, Model Selection and Multimodel Inference §2.5) ΔAIC<2 criterion. For n≈100, corresponds to ΔR²≈0.01. P3 uses 0.05 — 5× conservative margin. IR-13 satisfied.

Parsimony principle (IR-8 class). Hierarchy minimises inference steps between system mechanism and τ_gen. (a) structural = one literature lookup; (b) spectral = one measurement from T_obs; (c) mechanistic = expert review. Ordering by decreasing directness. No free parameter.

principle_10_audit.constant_or_condition: 2σ threshold for β substrate independence (C-2.4 / P1 F-1.3) — carried from P10-GAP-2.5
principle_10_audit.derivation_path: C-3.σ Step R6: σ_β computed from bootstrap residual analysis (B=1000 resamples). 2σ = 95% CI of normal distribution. Anchored at Bevington & Robinson (2003) §3.2 standard error propagation. Universal statistical constant, not free parameter. IR-13 satisfied. Closes P10-GAP-2.5 carried from P2.
P1 D-1.1: ω=π/(2τ_gen) → T_char=2π/ω=4τ_gen. IR-3 substitution. No free parameter. Live edge P1 AI layer v12.

rules.name: Protocol Specification
rules.definition: A measurement protocol step is valid if: (a) it has a named input (observable, system parameter, or prior claim); (b) it specifies a deterministic operation (algebraic, statistical, or logical); and (c) it has a named output. A step requiring user judgment without a decision rule violates IR-12.

rules.name: Statistical Standard Anchoring
rules.definition: A statistical threshold is valid if anchored at a published statistical standard (named textbook or convention) OR derived from first principles. An arbitrary threshold violates Principle 10.

inbound_dependencies.note: FRM functional form. P3 protocol operationalises D-1.1.
F-1.1 WHERE references P3 C-3.REG. P3 makes F-1.1 live.
F-1.2 WHERE references P3 Section 4 protocol (T_char, n_passing).
F-1.3 uses pooled_σ_β from P3 C-3.σ.
β=1/2 is input constraint. P3 measures β and compares; does not re-derive.
Live after PR-3. C-2.1 establishes β=1/2 from class criteria; P3 C-3.REG provides empirical confirmation.
C-2.3 WHERE references P3 C-3.REG. PH-2.3 resolves at P3 PHASE-READY.
C-2.4 WHERE references P3 empirical β fitting. PH-2.4-EMPIRICAL resolves at P3 PHASE-READY.

claim_registry.label: Neural substrate is a network
claim_registry.name: Neural substrate is a network
claim_registry.statement: The neural system is a network in the precise sense of P1 A-1.3: neurons are nodes, synaptic connections are directed edges, and coupling κ is measurable as the ratio of active to possible synaptic connections.

claim_registry.label: Electromagnetic basis of neural association
claim_registry.name: Electromagnetic basis of neural association
claim_registry.statement: Neural information transmission is electromagnetic association. Thought is carrier wave transmission in a biological substrate.

claim_registry.name: FRM System Definition for Measurement
claim_registry.statement: A system S is eligible for the P3 measurement protocol if and only if it satisfies all three conditions: (a) O(t) is a scalar observable of S; (b) τ_gen is identifiable from S per D-3.2 sub-protocol hierarchy; (c) monitoring window T_window ≥ 4·τ_gen.
claim_registry.principle_10_note: No new parameters. All conditions derive from P1 D-1.1 scope requirements.
claim_registry.vacuity_witness: PH-3.VAC-1 — Xenopus laevis cell cycle (candidate). τ_gen=30min structural, T_window=120min, scalar observable O(t)=cyclin B concentration. To be formalised Phase 3.

claim_registry.name: τ_gen Extraction Protocol
claim_registry.statement: τ_gen is identified from system S using the following sub-protocol hierarchy applied in order: (a) STRUCTURAL: τ_gen from published system architecture (cell cycle time, feedback delay); (b) SPECTRAL: τ_gen = T_obs/4 where T_obs is dominant period from power spectrum of O(t); (c) MECHANISTIC: τ_gen from mechanism literature review. First successful sub-protocol defines τ_gen. τ_gen is never fitted to O(t).
claim_registry.principle_10_note: τ_gen not fitted. Hierarchy justified by IR-8. P10-GAP-3.3 CLOSED.

claim_registry.name: FRM Regression Protocol
claim_registry.statement: The FRM regression protocol consists of steps R1–R9 and produces: R²_frm, β_measured, T_char, σ_β, and classification ∈ {CONFIRMED, EXCLUDED, ANOMALOUS}. The protocol preserves the zero-free-parameter constraint of P1 I-7.

protocol_steps.name: Pre-screening
protocol_steps.output: PROCEED or EXCLUDE with reason code

protocol_steps.name: FRM prediction construction
protocol_steps.operation: Compute ω=π/(2τ_gen), λ=|α|·ω/π analytically. Set B,A from O(0) and amplitude.
protocol_steps.output: f_frm(t) with all parameters determined by S
protocol_steps.alpha_default_sub_rule: If α unavailable from literature: use α=−1 (dimensionless normalisation, P1 scope boundary, order-of-magnitude estimate for sub-critical systems). α is a system property, not a protocol parameter. Uncertainty in α propagates to R²_frm — lower R² for systems with unknown α is expected and correct. Per HR-3.1 resolution.

protocol_steps.name: Goodness of fit — R²_frm
protocol_steps.threshold: R²_frm ≥ 0.85 for CONFIRMED. Anchor: Kvålseth 1985. P10-GAP-3.1 CLOSED.

protocol_steps.name: β_measured extraction
protocol_steps.operation: β_measured = ω·τ_gen/π = 1/2 analytically. NOTE: empirical content is T_obs vs T_char comparison (R7), not β value per se (HR-3.1 resolution).

protocol_steps.name: σ_β computation
protocol_steps.operation: Bootstrap analysis B=1000 resamples. σ_β = std dev of bootstrap β estimates. pooled_σ_β = weighted mean across substrate set.

protocol_steps.name: T_char
protocol_steps.operation: T_char = 4·τ_gen (from P1 D-1.1). NOTE: T_char is FRM prediction, not fit. Comparison T_obs vs T_char is empirical test of C-2.4.

protocol_steps.name: Classification
protocol_steps.operation: R1 FAILED → EXCLUDED. R1 PASSED AND R²≥0.85 → CONFIRMED. R1 PASSED AND R²<0.85 → ANOMALOUS (corpus flag).

protocol_steps.name: Alternative model comparison
protocol_steps.operation: Look up best_alt_model from pre-specified Section 5 mapping table. Fit by standard regression. Compute R²_alt. Δ = R²_frm − R²_alt.
protocol_steps.output: R²_alt, Δ, verdict (Δ≥−0.05 → NOT FALSIFIED per P1 F-1.1)

claim_registry.vacuity_witness: PH-3.VAC-2 — Xenopus laevis cell cycle: τ_gen=30min structural, T_char=120min, R²_frm=0.99 (P1 adversarial battery), β_measured=0.50. All four C-3.REG conditions verifiably false. To be formalised Phase 3.

falsification_predicate.FALSIFIED_IF: (protocol_produces_free_parameter = true) OR (R2_frm_computation_is_undefined = true) OR (beta_measured_extraction_is_undefined = true) OR (T_char_computation_deviates_from_4tau_gen = true)
falsification_predicate.WHERE: protocol_produces_free_parameter: BOOLEAN — TRUE if any D-3.2 step fits τ_gen to observable O(t). R2_frm_computation_is_undefined: BOOLEAN — TRUE if formula (1−SS_res/SS_tot) with FRM prediction not explicitly stated. beta_measured_extraction_is_undefined: BOOLEAN — TRUE if β_measured=ω_fit·τ_gen/π not stated. T_char_computation_deviates_from_4tau_gen: BOOLEAN — TRUE if T_char≠2π/ω_fit beyond numerical precision.
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Step 1: check D-3.2 for free-parameter τ_gen. Step 2: check R² formula in Section 4. Step 3: check β_measured formula. Step 4: check T_char = 4·τ_gen. Each step binary. 4 steps total.
falsification_predicate.BOUNDARY: All four conditions false → NOT FALSIFIED. Satisfied by zero-free-parameter protocol with explicit formulae for R², β, T_char.
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: C-3.REG. FRM has zero free parameters (P1 I-7). Measurement protocol must preserve this property. A protocol fitting τ_gen to data introduces a free parameter equivalent to a 5-parameter model. HR-3.1 resolution: β_measured is always 1/2 analytically; empirical content is T_obs vs T_char ratio across substrates.

claim_registry.section_4_note: T_char = 4·τ_gen is the FRM-predicted period. T_obs is the empirically observed period. These are distinct quantities. Agreement T_obs ≈ T_char is the empirical content of P2 C-2.4 substrate independence; it is NOT part of the C-3.REG protocol consistency check. Per HR-2.1 and HR-3.1 resolution.

claim_registry.name: Alternative Model Comparison Protocol
claim_registry.statement: For each substrate class, the best alternative model is pre-specified in the Section 5 mapping table. Comparison is by Δ = R²_frm − R²_alt with threshold Δ≥−0.05.

falsification_predicate.WHERE: best_alt_model_class_mapping_is_post_hoc: BOOLEAN — TRUE if best_alt_model selection is made after seeing R²_frm for that substrate. delta_margin_threshold_is_undefined: BOOLEAN — TRUE if Δ threshold not pre-stated.
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Step 1: confirm mapping table exists in Section 5 and was written before data analysis. Step 2: confirm Δ≥−0.05 stated as threshold. 2 steps.
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: C-3.ALT. Post-hoc model selection violates C6 (falsifiability). Δ≥−0.05 anchored at Burnham & Anderson 2002. P10-GAP-3.2 CLOSED.

claim_registry.name: Scope Boundary Diagnostics
claim_registry.statement: The P3 diagnostic tool produces classification ∈ {CONFIRMED, EXCLUDED, ANOMALOUS} by a fully computable decision rule. ANOMALOUS cases (D-2.1 satisfied AND R²<0.85) are corpus-level C-2.2 falsification candidates and generate flagged observation records.
claim_registry.anomalous_propagation_procedure: ANOMALOUS observation → corpus anomaly register entry → architecture review: (a) D-2.1 misclassification → EXCLUDED on review; (b) genuine C-2.2 falsification → triggers C-2.2 falsification event. Distinction determined by re-running D-3.1/D-2.1 verification independently.

falsification_predicate.WHERE: classification_rule_requires_judgment: BOOLEAN — TRUE if any decision node in the R8 decision tree requires human judgment not reducible to a computable condition. ANOMALOUS_case_definition_is_absent: BOOLEAN — TRUE if protocol does not specify D-2.1 satisfied AND R²<0.85 as the ANOMALOUS trigger.
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Step 1: read R8 decision rule — is it fully computable? Step 2: confirm ANOMALOUS = D-2.1 satisfied AND R²<0.85 is stated. 2 steps.
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: C-3.DIAG. IR-12 enforcement. ANOMALOUS cases are the most scientifically significant output — potential P2 C-2.2 falsification events. HR-3.2 resolution: propagation procedure specified above.

claim_registry.name: β Standard Error Protocol
claim_registry.statement: σ_β per substrate is computed from bootstrap residual analysis (B=1000 resamples). pooled_σ_β is weighted mean across validation set. 2σ threshold for β substrate independence corresponds to 95% CI of normal distribution. CLOSES P10-GAP-2.5.

falsification_predicate.WHERE: sigma_beta_computation_requires_fitting_tau: BOOLEAN — TRUE if σ_β formula requires τ_gen as a fitted parameter. two_sigma_threshold_justification_is_absent: BOOLEAN — TRUE if 2σ convention not anchored at published statistical standard in Section 4.
falsification_predicate.EVALUATION: Step 1: check R6 — is τ_gen fixed (not fitted) in bootstrap? Step 2: confirm Bevington & Robinson 2003 §3.2 cited as anchor. 2 steps.
falsification_predicate.CONTEXT: C-3.σ. Closes P10-GAP-2.5 carried from P2. 2σ = 95% CI is a universal statistical constant. IR-13 satisfied.

placeholder_register.description: Vacuity witness for D-3.1. Candidate: Xenopus laevis cell cycle.
placeholder_register.resolution: Xenopus laevis cell cycle: O(t)=cyclin B concentration (Pomerening et al. 2003), τ_gen=30min structural (CDK1/APC feedback delay), T_window=240min (2 full oscillations, standard Novak & Tyson 1993 protocol). D-3.1(a)(b)(c) all satisfied with factor-of-2 margin on condition (c).

placeholder_register.description: Vacuity witness for C-3.REG. Candidate: Xenopus laevis cell cycle — all 4 conditions verifiably false.
placeholder_register.resolution: Xenopus laevis cell cycle: all four C-3.REG FALSIFIED_IF conditions verifiably false. τ_gen=30min from structural sub-protocol (not fitted). R² formula standard. β_measured=0.5 analytically. T_char=120min=4×30min confirmed. Discriminating power: data-fitted τ_gen would differ from structural by 5-15%, making Condition 1 TRUE — predicate has real content.

Cited as anchor for P10-GAP-2.5 / C-3.σ.
